headline: Xylem (XYL) Could Be 19% Undervalued On Its Recurring Revenue Story
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Xylem (XYL) Xylem (XYL) has moved modestly in recent trading, with the stock roughly flat over the past day and up about 2% over the past week, giving investors a short term performance reference point. See our latest analysis for Xylem. Looking beyond the latest move, Xylem’s 9.43% 1 month share price return contrasts with a share price that is down 11.44% year to date, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 13.01% reflects a more constructive longer...

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Xylem, Raises Price Target to $159
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Deane Dray   maintains Xylem (NYSE:XYL) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $157 to $159.
